---
title: "Pauline De Witt"
---

## Pauline De Witt

**Dates:** (1831-1874)

**Maiden name:** (Guizot)

### Description

daughter of François Guizot

### Biography

She married (1850) Cornélis de Witt (1828-1889).  Like her sister Henriette (Guizot) de Witt, she published fiction and translations from English.  They had married brothers. [<i>Lettres à sa fille Henriette</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from June 14th 1894
- Letter from August 13. [1869]
- Letter from August 10. [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
